body.purpose: The 13px UI base; everything from table cells to button labels.

mono.purpose: Code, ids, keyboard keys — content that is literally monospaced, never decoration.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Resting cards that genuinely need lift.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Popovers, modals — every transient floating surface.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/press transition duration; easing comes from --transition-ease (fallback: ease).

motion.name: transition-ease
motion.purpose: Hover/press easing curve; themes retune it (steps(1), ease-out-expo, linear).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid info button — the one 'do the thing' action per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 28px; background: var(--accent-blue, #2563eb); color: var(--bg-surface, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--accent-blue, #2563eb); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.12s ease, border-color 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-blue, #2563eb) 88%, #000); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent-blue, #2563eb); outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral outline — cancel and secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 28px; background: var(--bg-inset, #ecedf2); color: var(--text-secondary, #555b6e); border: 1px solid var(--border-default, #d8dae2); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.12s ease, color 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg-surface-hover, #f0f1f4); color: var(--text-primary, #181b24); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent-blue, #2563eb); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Wrapper-focus text field; border shifts to Action Blue on focus-within.
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--bg-surface, #fff); color: var(--text-primary, #181b24); border: 1px solid var(--border-default, #d8dae2); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 13px; font-family: inherit; transition: border-color 0.12s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted, #878ea0); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent-blue, #2563eb); }

components.name: Toned Chip
components.description: Success chip via the shared tone recipe (9% tint / 30% border / 72% ink).
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-green, #059669) 9%, var(--bg-surface, #fff)); border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-green, #059669) 30%, var(--border-default, #d8dae2)); color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-green, #059669) 72%, var(--text-primary, #181b24)); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Popover Card
components.description: The one chrome for every transient floating surface.
components.html:
Open session
Copy id
Archive
components.css: .ds-popover { background: var(--bg-surface, #fff); border: 1px solid var(--border-default, #d8dae2); border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding: 4px; width: 200px; font-size: 13px; } .ds-popover__item { padding: 5px 8px; border-radius: 4px; color: var(--text-secondary, #555b6e); cursor: pointer; } .ds-popover__item:hover { background: var(--bg-surface-hover, #f0f1f4); color: var(--text-primary, #181b24); } .ds-popover__item--active { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-blue, #2563eb) 12%, transparent); color: var(--accent-blue, #2563eb); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: Signature session-state indicator with the waiting-gold pulse.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary, #555b6e); } .ds-status__dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--status-waiting, #a48a55); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(164,138,85,0.5); animation: ds-pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(164,138,85,0.4); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(164,138,85,0); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(164,138,85,0); } }

narrative.overview: kit-ui is the shared component vocabulary for kenn-io's developer tools: a calm, dense tool surface where everything is within reach and nothing is decorative. Density is a feature; the tool disappears into the task. Structure comes from 1px borders and tonal steps, not shadow stacks. The Workbench is the base identity; alternate identities ship as opt-in theme packs in themes.css, each retuning the full token surface while components stay byte-identical.
keyCharacteristics: Dense, compact, keyboard-first; 13px desktop base that self-scales to 16px on touch
Borders define structure; shadows only lift transient surfaces
One accent (blue) for primary action, selection, and focus; five semantic accents used only for meaning
Every interactive state standardized: hover, focus-visible ring, active press, disabled at 0.5 opacity

rules.name: The Tokens-Only Rule
rules.body: No component ships a hex color. Palette lives in theme.css; pure #000/#fff are permitted only inside color-mix() as shade arithmetic.

rules.name: The Tone Recipe Rule
rules.body: Toned surfaces always derive from the shared data-kit-tone recipe: 9% tint background, 30% border, 72% ink toward --text-primary.

rules.name: The Pointer-Keyed Scale Rule
rules.body: The whole rem scale redefines itself on coarse-pointer devices. Components never write type media queries; apps never pin html font-size.

rules.name: The Rem-for-Text-Only Rule
rules.body: Text is rem; spacing, borders, radii, and chrome are px. Gaps come from the --space-1…8 ladder.

rules.name: The One-Card Rule
rules.body: Every floating surface uses .kit-popover-card. Hand-rolled copies are flagged by kit-ui-check.

dos: Do read every color through a --token; fallbacks like var(--accent-green, #22c55e) are the only inline hex allowed.
Do keep gaps on the --space ladder and radii on --radius-sm/md/lg.
Do give every interactive element the full state set: hover, :focus-visible ring, active, disabled.
Do use data-kit-tone + the three recipe tokens for any toned surface.
Do keep new themes structural: retune radius, shadow character, border presence, motion speed, focus treatment, and type together, as one identity.
donts: Don't touch the default light/dark palettes when adding themes; alternate identities live in themes.css under data-kit-theme.
Don't use side-stripe border-left accents, gradient text, glassmorphism, hero-metric layouts, or identical icon-card grids.
Don't write type media queries in components or pin the root font size in apps.
Don't draw keyboard focus with box-shadow; it must be a real outline so high-contrast can widen it.
